runners.formComment: Last start finished 7th over 320m at this track beaten 6 lengths (18.89) behind No More Trouble in a Mix 2/3 on April 8. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th over 340m at Bulli beaten 2.25 lengths (19.62) behind Huggett in a Grade 5 on April 7. Has the ability to take this out.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.97) at Gosford in a Mix 3/4, finishing fourth and beaten 2.25 lengths. Has three successes and five minors from 14 starts from box 3. Tough field and looking to others this time.
